phases.name: Python Domain Extension
phases.description: Extend PES domain model for TikZ routing and quality tracking fields

steps.name: TikZ routing in VisualAssetService
criteria: VisualAssetService routes 'tikz' generation_method to a TikZ handler
TikZ handler returns FigureGenerationResult with format 'tikz'
Existing methods (corpus-reuse, external, mermaid) unchanged
FigureGenerationResult carries prompt_hash and iteration_count fields
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: code/tdd. Add _generate_tikz() method parallel to _generate_mermaid(). Add optional prompt_hash: str = '' and iteration_count: int = 0 to FigureGenerationResult.

steps.name: FileVisualAssetAdapter TikZ persistence
criteria: Adapter writes TikZ source (.tex) and preview (.pdf) to figures directory
Adapter reads TikZ figures with format 'tikz' from inventory
Existing write_figure and read paths unchanged
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: code/tdd. Extend write_figure to handle binary content (PDF) alongside text (TEX, SVG).

phases.name: Visual Style Intelligence Skill
phases.description: Create new skill with domain-style database and style profile schema

steps.name: Create visual-style-intelligence skill
criteria: Skill contains agency-domain style database (Navy, Air Force, Army, DARPA, generic)
Each domain entry has palette (hex), tone, detail level, avoid list
Style profile YAML schema defined with validation rules
Recommendation guidance for agent: read solicitation, identify domain, recommend
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: forge/skill. New file. Follow nWave skill format: YAML frontmatter + domain knowledge sections.

phases.name: Prompt Engineering Enhancement
phases.description: Extend visual-asset-generator skill with structured prompt templates and critique patterns

steps.name: Engineered prompt templates in skill
criteria: Skill defines structured prompt template with COMPOSITION, STYLE, LABELS, AVOID, RESOLUTION sections
Per-figure-type prompt patterns provided (system-diagram, concept, block-diagram, etc.)
Style profile injection point documented (palette, tone from YAML)
Figure plan metadata injection documented (section content, compliance items)
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: skill/edit. Replace existing 'Prompt engineering for SBIR figures' section with structured templates.

steps.name: Critique categories and refinement patterns in skill
criteria: Five critique categories defined with descriptions and 1-5 rating scale
Per-category prompt adjustment patterns documented (additions/removals)
Refinement preservation rules specified (high-rated sections unchanged)
Maximum 3 iterations with escape path guidance
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: skill/edit. Add 'Structured Critique' and 'Refinement Patterns' sections after prompt templates.

steps.name: TikZ generation guidance in skill
criteria: TikZ section covers when to offer, compatible figure types, compilation steps
Fallback guidance on compilation failure documented
Method selection guide updated with TikZ entry
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: skill/edit. Add 'TikZ Generation' section. Update method selection table.

phases.name: Formatter Agent Workflow Enhancement
phases.description: Update sbir-formatter agent with style analysis, prompt preview, critique loop, TikZ routing, and quality summary

steps.name: Style analysis and prompt preview in formatter agent
criteria: Phase 1 includes style analysis: load style skill, read solicitation, recommend profile, persist YAML
Phase 2 includes prompt preview: construct prompt, display, offer edit/generate/skip
Agent loads visual-style-intelligence skill in Phase 1 skill loading table
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: agent/edit. Add style analysis step to Phase 1. Add prompt preview to Phase 2 before generation.

steps.name: Critique loop and TikZ routing in formatter agent
criteria: Phase 2 review checkpoint replaced with structured 5-category critique
Refinement loop: flagged categories trigger prompt adjustments, max 3 rounds, escape paths
TikZ routing: offered for LaTeX + compiler + diagram types, compile-verify-present workflow
Quality ratings and prompt hash recorded in figure log
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: agent/edit. Replace Phase 2 review section. Add TikZ workflow alongside existing methods.

steps.name: Quality summary at Wave 5 conclusion
criteria: Post-Phase 2 quality summary: aggregate ratings, style consistency check, outlier detection
Summary persisted to wave-5-visuals/quality-summary.md
Style inconsistencies and quality outliers flagged with actionable options
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: agent/edit. Add quality summary step between Phase 2 and Phase 3.

phases.name: Command Documentation Updates
phases.description: Update command files to document new style analysis, prompt preview, and critique features

steps.name: Update wave visuals and draft figure commands
criteria: /proposal wave visuals documents style analysis step in flow and examples
/proposal draft figure documents prompt preview and critique loop in flow and examples
Both commands reference new skills in context files
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: command/edit. Update Flow, Examples, and Context Files sections in both commands.
